task_objective: Fix QAM panel metadata counters, Refresh Activity explainer, and redundant status spinner
design_decisions: Resolvers now only return 'matched' if the record is fully complete, otherwise they pass partial records forward for merging.

Added a guard in _steam_scan_match_sync so it only returns a partial 'miss' with metadata if something was actually resolved (steam_appid or steam_news), preserving prior total-miss persistence behavior.

Updated enriched_titles expectation in tests/test_scan_resolves_steam_appid.py to ['Wobbly Life', 'Wobbly Life', 'Wobbly Life'] because the plan requires re-running _metadata_with_steam_news_sync on an IGN backfill, resulting in an extra call.
Fixed IGN merge to only overlay IGN's non-empty fields or re-pin the Steam fields from best_partial so that steam_appid and steam_news survive the IGN backfill.
results: Implemented required fixes, updated tests to use realistic IGN return value, passed quality gates and functional testing.
